name: multi-company-portal
description: Multi-company login portal that hosts the FinTrack financial app per tenant, with master/staff accounts.
whatsNew: The How-to guide now explains the deposit & withdrawal tick-boxes: Redeposit, Store withdraw, Actual paid amount, Store + actual paid, and deposit from Unclaimed credit.
It includes a clear chart of what each one does to your totals, banks, store credit and unclaimed credit, plus a worked money example for each.
As always, available in English, 中文 (Chinese) and ភាសាខ្មែរ (Khmer).
